feat.name: Vomit Stomach
feat.text: In dire circumstances you can vomit out your stomach to expel toxins. Reduce your sickened condition by 2 and immediately attempt a saving throw with a +2 circumstance bonus against any ingested poisons you have been exposed to within the last minute. You become off-guard for 1 round as your exposed stomach makes you especially vulnerable to attacks.

traits.name: Tripkee
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the tripkee ancestry. Tripkees are a family of froglike humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by tripkees. An item with this trait is created and used by tripkees.

feat.trigger: You gain the sickened condition or fail a saving throw against an ingested poison.
